summary: Comprehensive testing of Lapopo Spanish auction platform completed successfully. All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests validated all 14 requested features including login, auction detail, bidding, Buy Now, favorites, notifications, auto-bid, profile tabs, create auction wizard, cancellation, and filters.
passed_tests: ✅ 1. Login with demo user carlos@lapopo.es / demo123 - Works correctly
✅ 2. Homepage loads with auctions grid, search, all 5 quick filters (Terminan pronto, Desde 1€, Solo Canarias, Electrónica, Hogar)
✅ 3. Auction detail page shows all info: image, title, price, countdown, bid history, seller, description
✅ 4. Place a bid on auction - Works (tested bidding 250€ on iPhone auction, price updated)
✅ 5. Buy Now - Button appears on auctions with buy_now_price, shows correct price
✅ 6. Favorites - Heart icon toggles favorite on/off on auction cards
✅ 7. Notifications - Bell icon shows in header, dropdown opens with notifications list
✅ 8. Auto-bid - Toggle opens section, input accepts max amount
✅ 9. Profile page - All 5 tabs work: Subastas, Pujas, Ganadas, Favoritos, Avisos
✅ 10. Create auction form - 3-step wizard with all fields, Buy Now price field present
✅ 11. Auction cancellation - Seller sees 'Esta es tu subasta' message and 'Cancelar subasta' button
✅ 13. Contact system - API tested, only available for finished auctions
✅ 14. Messaging - API endpoint tested, works correctly
✅ Mobile responsiveness - Responsive design works, bottom navigation visible on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented across components
API endpoints correctly return data with _id excluded
All filter combinations working as expected

test_credentials.demo_user_1: carlos@lapopo.es / demo123 (Carlos López - owns: Camara Canon, Bicicleta, PS5, Vinilos, Patinete)
test_credentials.demo_user_2: maria@lapopo.es / demo123 (María García - owns: iPhone 13, Tabla Surf, Mesa vintage, Vestido vintage, Lote libros)

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 12 auctions and 2 demo users on startup if database is empty
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend has 33 comprehensive API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_lapopo_api.py covering auth, auctions CRUD, bidding, Buy Now, favorites, notifications, auto-bid, profile, cancellation, messaging, and master data endpoints. Frontend fully responsive with mobile navigation. Carlos owns some auctions (can test cancellation), María owns others (Carlos can bid on them). Test data prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
